title: Which Companies Are Hiring Security Engineers Right Now? (Live ATS Data)
description: 57 open security engineer roles across 11 companies, live-scraped 2026-07-12: top employers, 60% remote share, posting dates.
answer_first: As of a July 12, 2026 scrape of live company job boards, there are 57 open security engineer roles across 11 companies. OpenAI leads the field with 14 openings, and 60% of all listed roles are marked remote. This is the first snapshot of this dataset, captured 2026-07-12, with 57 roles in the opening baseline. The table below lists every role with company, title, location, remote status, and posting date.

facts: Total live openings in this capture: 57 security engineer roles from 11 companies (fetched 2026-07-12).
OpenAI is the largest hirer with 14 open roles; Anthropic follows with 10.
34 of 57 roles (60%) are listed as remote-eligible.
The most common location is San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY | Seattle, WA, attached to 6 of the openings.
5 of the roles were posted within the 7 days before the fetch date.
First snapshot recorded 2026-07-12: a baseline of 57 open roles.

faq.q: How was this job data collected?
faq.a: It comes from one automated scrape of public company careers boards (Greenhouse, Lever, and Ashby style ATS pages) on 2026-07-12, matching roles for the query 'security engineer'. The run returned 57 open roles across 11 companies, and every row keeps the posting date shown by the employer.

faq.q: Which company has the most open security engineer roles?
faq.a: OpenAI leads with 14 of the 57 openings in this capture, followed by Anthropic with 10. Hiring volume shifts week to week, so the leader can change between refreshes.

faq.q: How many of these roles are remote?
faq.a: 34 of the 57 roles (60%) are flagged remote by the employer's own listing. The Remote column in the table shows the flag for every individual role.

It reflects a 2026-07-12 capture of live boards; 5 of the roles were posted in the 7 days before the fetch. The page refreshes on the same URL and reports what opened and closed since the prior snapshot.

related_product.name: Company Careers Job Scraper (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby)
